zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Crouchman於1329年之前出生在英國艾可普斯亞德時，她的父親William Crouchman31歲，母親Egidia Greig24歲。她於1372年與John Wyncelowe在英國艾可普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年10月在英國奧可福爾布爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Crouchman于1329年之前出生在英国艾可普斯亞德时，她的父亲William Crouchman31岁，母亲Egidia Greig24岁。她于1372年与John Wyncelowe在英国艾可普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年10月在英国奧可福爾布爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Crouchman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: from Middle English crouche, cruche ‘cross’ + man, perhaps denoting a person who lived by a cross. Compare Crouch .

variants.name: Crouch
meanings: English (southeastern): from Middle English crouch(e), cruch(e) ‘cross’ (Old English crūc, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem; the Old English crūc was replaced in Middle English by the word cross, from Old Norse kross), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a cross.

variants.name: Croucher
meanings: English: topographic name denoting a person who lived by a cross, from an agent derivative of Middle English crouche, cruche ‘cross’. See also Crouch .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Crouchman was born before 1329, in Hempstead, Essex, England, her father, William Crouchman, was 31 and her mother, Egidia Greig, was 24. She married John Wyncelowe in 1372, in Hempstead, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in October 1409, in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Crouchman est née avant 1329, à Hempstead, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Crouchman, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Egidia Greig, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Wyncelowe en 1372, à Hempstead, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en octobre 1409, à Bourton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1372 in Hempstead, Essex, England John Wyncelowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Oktober 1409 in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Crouchmanが1329年以前にイギリスエセックスヘンプステアドで生まれた時，父William Crouchmanは31歳，母Egidia Greigは24歳であった。1372年にイギリスエセックスヘンプステアドでJohn Wynceloweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年10月にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアボウルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Crouchman(이)가 1329년 이전 영국 에세스 헤프스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Crouchman(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Greig(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1372년 영국 에세스 헤프스테아드에서 John Wyncelowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 10월 영국 스퍼드실르 부르턴에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Wyncelowe em 1372, em Hempstead, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1409, em Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Crouchman родилась перед 1329 г. в местности хемпстид, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William Crouchman было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Egidia Greig, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wyncelowe в 1372 г. в местности хемпстид, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла октябрь 1409 г. в местности буртон, оксфордшир, Англия.
